name: multi-field-d1-lipschitz
description: Wave 3 Phase 3 (6/N) — Tier D1 per-brick directional Lipschitz field baseline. Multi-Field scene rendered with the always-on D1 path: populate.wgsl writes per-brick Bernstein-trivariate coefficients (64 floats per brick, sampled gradient magnitudes at 4×4×4 grid points), main-atlas.wgsl's marchRay reads `lipschitzAtBrick(slotIdx, rd)` and uses it as a per-direction step-size divisor (replaces the legacy global-Lipschitz constant). Visual expectation: pixel-near-identical to the pre-D1 baseline (`multi-field-orbit`), since the constant-polynomial stub mathematically degenerates to scalar Lipschitz; with the actual gradient sampling shipped in Phase 3 (4.5/N), L is now per-direction and may produce slightly larger safe step sizes (faster convergence, no overshoot). Pixel-diff baselines approved on first run.
